name: API-TIMEOUT
trigger_condition: LLM or external API call exceeds timeout threshold
impact: Process hangs or fails silently; partial output may be returned without warning
mitigation: Add retry logic with exponential backoff; set explicit timeout with fallback behaviour

name: CONTEXT-OVERFLOW
trigger_condition: Input exceeds token limit of the processing context (e.g., transcript > 50k tokens)
impact: AI truncates input without warning; loses context from the end of the document
mitigation: Chunk input before processing; validate total token count; use chunked handoff pattern

name: FORMAT-MISMATCH
trigger_condition: Skill A output format does not match Skill B expected input format
impact: Integration fails at handoff; data loss or corruption; downstream skill crashes or produces garbage
mitigation: Validate output against interface schema before handoff; add format assertion at each boundary

name: MISSING-FALLBACK
trigger_condition: Primary logic path fails with no alternative or graceful degradation defined
impact: Process crashes or returns empty result; user gets no useful feedback
mitigation: Add explicit fallback logic for critical paths; emit clear error messages on failure

name: SILENT-FAILURE
trigger_condition: Error occurs but no logging, alert, or output signal is produced
impact: Bug goes undetected; corrupted or incomplete output appears valid
mitigation: Add explicit error logging at each processing stage; validate output before returning

name: STALE-DEPENDENCY
trigger_condition: A referenced config file, asset, or upstream output is outdated or from a previous run
impact: Decisions are made on stale data; output does not reflect current state
mitigation: Check file modification timestamps; add freshness validation before processing

name: SCOPE-CREEP-INPUT
trigger_condition: User provides input outside the skill's designed domain (e.g., video file to a text-only skill)
impact: Skill attempts to process out-of-scope input; produces nonsensical output or crashes
mitigation: Add input validation at Step 1; reject unsupported formats with a clear message

name: RACE-CONDITION
trigger_condition: Two skills or processes read/write the same file concurrently
impact: File corruption; one process overwrites another's output; non-deterministic results
mitigation: Use unique output paths per run; add file locking or sequential execution guarantees

name: ENCODING-CORRUPTION
trigger_condition: Input file contains mojibake, mixed encodings, or non-UTF-8 characters
impact: Pattern matching fails; word counts are wrong; structured parsers break at corrupted boundaries
mitigation: Detect encoding at load time; normalize to UTF-8 before processing

name: EMPTY-OR-TRIVIAL-INPUT
trigger_condition: Input file exists but contains too little content for meaningful processing
impact: Skill returns zero or vacuous results that appear complete; user trusts empty output
mitigation: Check content length at load; abort early with a clear message if below minimum threshold
